Notice Of Motion To Compel Compliance With The Judge Pro Tems Order Re Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories Employment And For An Award Of A Monetary Sanction Against Defendant And Its Counsel, Matthew Yan In The Amount Of 4047.50
Off Calendar May-18-2021 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

APPEARANCES (VIA ZOOM VIDEOCONFERENCE):
Atty. MATTHEW STEPHENSON, Esq. of Kochan & Stephenson (Tel: 510-649-1130) for Plaintiff Margarita Herrera;
Atty. MATTHEW K. YAN. Esq. of San Francisco City Attorney's Office (Tel: 415-554-3845) for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.

HEARING RE: PLAINTIFF MARGARITA HERRERA's Motion To Compel Compliance With The Judge Pro Tems Order Re Plaintiffs Form Interrogatories Employment And For An Award Of A Monetary Sanction Against Defendant And Its Counsel, Matthew Yan In The Amount Of $4047.50.

Parties stipulate to the matter being decided by the Judge Pro Tem. The Judge Pro Tem and counsel for parties authorize the clerk to sign the stipulation form on their behalf.

Matter argued and submitted.

The Court rules as follows: Motion is granted in part and denied in part.

Order signed.

Judge Pro Tem: Steven Stein; Clerk: Sean Kane; Not Reported (302/JPT)
